# Christina Charlier

> Game programmer and educator based in Austria, holding an M.Sc. in Computer Science.
> This site is a portfolio featuring shipped games, teaching work, and technical blog posts about Unreal Engine.

## About
- Gameplay programmer specializing in Unreal Engine (C++) with a focus on multiplayer systems
- Worked professionally at Pow Wow Entertainment (Jected Rivals) and Aesir Interactive (Police Simulator)
- Teaches Unreal Engine at FH Salzburg (University of Applied Sciences)

## Technical Posts
- [Replication Pitfalls in Unreal Engine](https://chriscalation.com/posts/replication-pitfalls/): Common multiplayer replication gotchas in UE
- [Using C++ Timers in Unreal Engine](https://chriscalation.com/posts/timer-in-unreal/): How to use FTimerHandle and FTimerDelegate

## Projects
- [Jected Rivals](https://chriscalation.com/posts/jected-rivals/): AA multiplayer game on Steam, 2 years as gameplay programmer
- [Police Simulator: Patrol Officers](https://chriscalation.com/posts/police-simulator/): AA game on Steam, tech lead on Contraband Expansion
- [Berghotel Heist](https://chriscalation.com/posts/berghotel-heist/): Indie co-op horror game on Steam

## Contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christina-charlier-at/
